# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes deployment YAML for our application stack. Include deployments for web application, Memcached cache, and background workers. Define services to expose Memcached for inter-pod communication. This is for our production Kubernetes cluster.
# Category: memcached_exposed_port

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: web-app-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: web-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: web-app
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: web-app
          image: webapp-image:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: web-app-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: web-app
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 80
  type: LoadBalancer

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: memcached-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: memcached
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: memcached
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: memcached
          image: memcached:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 11211

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: memcached-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: memcached
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 11211
      targetPort: 11211

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: background-worker-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: background-worker
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: background-worker
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: background-worker
          image: background-worker-image:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 5000
